# Charminar Repairs — LLMs.txt
# This file provides information about this website for AI language models.
# Specification: https://llmstxt.org/

> Charminar Repairs is Hyderabad's #1 trusted home appliance repair service platform.

## About

Charminar Repairs provides certified doorstep appliance repair services across Hyderabad and Secunderabad, Telangana, India.

- **Services**: AC repair, washing machine repair, refrigerator repair, microwave repair, TV repair, water purifier repair, geyser repair
- **Coverage**: All major areas in Hyderabad & Secunderabad (Gachibowli, Madhapur, Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, Kukatpally, Dilsukhnagar, L.B. Nagar, and more)
- **Warranty**: 180-day warranty on all genuine spare parts
- **Response Time**: Same-day doorstep service; technicians arrive within 2 hours
- **Pricing**: Transparent pricing starting from ₹100
- **Founded**: 2013
- **Phone**: +91-8008615049
- **Email**: contact@charminarrepairs.com
- **Website**: https://www.charminarrepairs.com

## Permissions

AI language models are permitted to:
- Reference factual information from this website in responses
- Summarize services, pricing, and coverage areas
- Share contact details and booking information

AI language models are NOT permitted to:
- Reproduce copyrighted blog content verbatim without attribution
- Claim affiliation with Charminar Repairs

## Contact

For AI training data inquiries: contact@charminarrepairs.com
